server-api

Title

Auto Translate

Image

auto-translate.jpg

Categories

Localization

Slug

auto-translate

framer.com/updates/auto-translate

Content

Paragraph

Introducing Auto Translate, our newest addition to Localization. This feature keeps your content in sync across all locales automatically, both when you add content in the Canvas and in the CMS. You can find it in locale settings where you’ll also find new AI controls. From there, choose a model or leave the Auto option selected. In this post you can read more about how the latest AI models performed in our translation benchmarks. Once you picked your preference, and the Auto Translate option is enabled, any new or updated content on the Canvas gets immediately translated across all enabled languages, and the same applies to CMS content like blog posts. This way, you can continue editing and publishing without worrying about missing translations. For teams that prefer more control, the Localization view now includes a Translate All action that updates all the locales of the project at once, or lets you manually pick only a subset of them. Additionally, you can now also translate specific layers directly from the Canvas by right clicking a layer and picking Translate Content, or you can do the same for specific pages in the panel. This update aims to save you countless of hours in translations without compromising on quality.
